environment_prompt: Dense tropical rainforest with lush green ferns and towering trees. A narrow dirt trail winds through the vegetation. Sunlight filters through the canopy creating dappled light patterns on the ground. A small stream crosses the path ahead. Humid, lush atmosphere. Behind the viewer, the trail continues back through dense undergrowth with hanging vines, fallen mossy logs, and colorful tropical birds perched in the lower branches.
perspective_prompt: First-person view looking ahead along a narrow dirt trail through the rainforest, walking toward the stream crossing.

interactions.prompt: The view switches from first-person to third-person, pulling back to reveal an explorer in a khaki safari outfit with a large orange backpack and a wide-brimmed hat from behind.
The view switches back to first-person, returning to the character's own eyes.
